# Alla Shapiro — Fractional VP R&D & Advisory | RNDQueen

## Who is Alla Shapiro?
Alla Shapiro is a senior R&D management executive and the founder of RNDQueen (rndqueen.com). She has 20+ years of hands-on experience leading global engineering teams, game studios, and software organizations across Israel, North America, and Europe.

She offers fractional VP R&D, R&D advisory, game studio leadership, and engineering team-scaling services. Clients are typically startups, scale-ups, corporate innovation units, and game studios that need experienced R&D leadership without a full-time executive hire.

## Services

### Fractional VP R&D
Embedded, hands-on senior R&D leadership — operational from day one. Alla aligns teams, unblocks delivery, and owns the full R&D picture. Structured as a monthly retainer; no long-term lock-in.

### R&D Advisory
Strategic counsel for CxOs and boards on engineering organization design, team structure, processes, and technical culture.

### Game Studio Advisory
Specialized R&D leadership for game development studios and interactive product organizations. Production management, team structure, and delivery processes for gaming environments.

### Team Scaling
Building and structuring high-performing R&D teams for growth-stage companies — hiring strategy, org design, onboarding processes, and cross-functional alignment.

## Ideal client profile
- Startup or scale-up (seed to Series C) needing a senior R&D leader before or instead of a full-time VP R&D hire
- Corporate innovation unit needing interim or fractional R&D ownership
- Game studio needing experienced R&D and production management
- Any tech company where engineering, product, and business teams are misaligned or delivery is inconsistent
- Israel-based organizations (can work on-site); remote-first for international clients

## Key facts
- 20+ years of R&D management experience
- New engagements can start within 1–2 weeks of the intro call
- Monthly retainer model with 30-day notice period — full flexibility, no long-term commitment
- Serves clients across 3 continents: Israel, Europe, North America
- Past and current clients include: Amdocs, NICE, 4CAST, LifeWard, TripEx, Razore Engineering, Infinity

## How to engage
- Free 30-minute intro call: https://calendly.com/allsha/30-minutes-with-alla
- Paid 1-hour strategy session: https://calendly.com/allsha/30min
- Email: alla@rndqueen.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/allsha/
- Website: https://rndqueen.com

## Frequently asked questions

Q: How quickly can we get started?
A: Most engagements kick off within 1–2 weeks of the intro call. The first step is a short discovery conversation to define scope — after that, we move fast.

Q: Is there a minimum commitment or contract length?
A: No long-term lock-in. Engagements are structured as monthly retainers with a 30-day notice period, so you stay in full control of the relationship.

Q: Can this work for a remote or distributed team?
A: Yes — most work is conducted remotely and designed for distributed teams. For Israel-based organizations, on-site presence is available when it adds value.

Q: How is a fractional engagement priced?
A: Pricing is based on scope and weekly hours, structured as a monthly retainer. You get senior R&D leadership at a fraction of a full-time executive cost — with full flexibility to scale up or down.

## Testimonials

"Professional 'can do' approach, optimism & smile will always be her trademark. Alla is an exceptional & talented person. Any company will be lucky to have her." — Ella Vidra, CIO, eToro

"From the get-go I could recognise in her very clear traits — clarity, focus, stability, and a 'get it done' attitude. She is a trustworthy and professional manager and I wholeheartedly recommend her to any business." — Gabi Levy, Head of Project Management, Amdocs IT

"Alla was an incredible mentor, hugely instrumental in helping me grow professionally. She created an atmosphere of trust and respect, fostering collaboration and encouraging ownership." — Viktoria Okolotovich, VP R&D, Playtika

- Governed by Israeli law, Tel Aviv jurisdiction
- GDPR and Israeli Privacy Protection Law (1981) compliant
- Accessibility: WCAG 2.1 Level AA, Israeli Standard SI 5568
